---
title: "Notes"
---

# Notes hub

This folder contains quick recipes and reference notes.  
Use the “Tricks” page for copy-paste workflows; use `experiments/` for full analysis notebooks.

- [Tricks](tricks.qmd): quick, short snippets for census API, `gt`, and Quarto.
- [Census API tips](../experiments/us_census_api/census.qmd): full experiment with transform & save.
- [GT tables](../experiments/gt_tables/gt_tables.qmd): complete formatting workflow.
